target: 6. Drawing Close
...It's quiet.
Still no message from Tokiko?
Yeah, no messages have come in at all.
Is that so.
Just a little more patience until the ferry's time. You should just rest and take it easy until then.
Yeah…

Hey, Shin-chan.
What do you do for fun in Tokyo?
Huh?
I guess it's different from the countryside? Like going to stylish cafes on the way home from school.
You know... what's the point of asking that now?
Nothing, I was just a little curious.
There's still time until the ferry, so it's better to stay quiet and not do anything unnecessary.
If a Shadow is nearby, we'd end up giving away our location.
Yeah... I know.
But... if I just stay quiet, I end up thinking about weird things.
It feels like my mind is going to be crushed... by things I don't even want to think about...
Sorry, I said a bit too much. I didn't consider your feelings, Mio... It's only natural you'd be anxious.
Alright, let's talk until you feel better. As long as we don't make too much noise, it should be fine.

Yeah.
So, what should we talk about?
Let's see... First, about what you asked earlier.
Mio, you really are interested in Tokyo, aren't you.
Huh?
Sorry, but I might not be able to tell you the kind of stories you're expecting. I have nothing to do with things like stylish cafes.
What I wanted to ask about wasn't that sort of thing...
Then, what is it?
Um…
There's something I've wanted to ask you for a long time, Shin-chan.
Yeah, let's hear it.
Shin-chan… Did you get a girlfriend in Tokyo?
Wh... what are you saying all of a sudden!?
You don't have to be so surprised...
Ah, yeah, sorry... You just asked something crazy out of nowhere.
So, how about it? Do you have a pretty girlfriend in Tokyo?
Do I look like I have one? There's no way I could get a girlfriend.
That's not true. If you put your mind to it, Shin-chan, you'd definitely be popular.
You're overestimating me...
But if that's the case, Shin-chan, you can come back here after you graduate.
Since there's no one in Tokyo you'd leave behind and make cry, right?
Hey... What are you talking about?
I'm saying it would be great if you came back here and took over Kofune, Shin-chan.
Eh...
If you did, I'd help out all the time too.
Of course, if you can get a job at a good restaurant in Tokyo, Shin-chan, you can prioritize that.
But... I'd be happy if you came back someday.
I see…
Sh-Shin-chan, it's been a while since you've been in the gym, right? How is it?
Even if you ask me how it is... I just think it hasn't changed much.
Ah... Being at school reminded me.
Mio, do you remember? A girl named Koyuba-san who was in the same class as me and Ushio.
I think she transferred to Tokyo when I was in 5th grade.
Hmm... I kind of remember. Um... she was a quiet girl, right?
Yeah, that's her. Her full name is Koyuba Kaori, but--
Koyuba Kaori!? You don't mean... Kaori-chan!?
Shhh, your voice is too loud.
Sorry! B-But, really? That idol, Kaori-chan?
Seems like it. Surprising, right?
Yeah, I'm really surprised.
Tokyo is an amazing place, huh. She seemed so quiet when she was on the island.
Well, it's not like just moving to Tokyo made her an idol.
It's the result of her own hard work.
Wh-What's the deal? You're really taking Kaori-chan's side, Shin-chan, could it be...
What?
Ah! I knew it!?
You came back from Tokyo together with your idol girlfriend!?
Wh-What are you saying! I only just reunited with her the day before yesterday!
Ah... oops. My voice was pretty loud just now, wasn't it.
Hehe, yeah.
...I wonder if Kaori-chan managed to escape okay?
I really feel sorry for her. She came all the way back to her hometown, and this terrible thing had to happen...
She's fine. I'm sure she's fine.
Yeah…
Still, an idol, huh. It's a weird feeling to have a celebrity come from our generation on this island.
If Onee-chan had gone to Tokyo too, she might have been able to become a celebrity.
Eh... Ushio?
You think so too, right, Shin-chan? I mean, Onee-chan was so pretty, you know?
I wonder about that... But even if Ushio became an idol.
She'd probably talk back to some big shot she didn't like and get fired right away, wouldn't she?
Ahaha, that's true. I can picture it now.
Right?
*Sigh*... It feels like it's been a while since we talked like this. It's super nostalgic.
I wanted to talk more like this... about pointless things, just the three of us.
Onee-chan... Why isn't she here...
Why… why is it just us?
Yeah... I wonder why.
Ah, no, no! I'm getting weak-hearted right away!
If it were Onee-chan, she'd never be weak-hearted. She'd definitely be pushing forward more positively!
For a while, maybe I'll try to act by thinking, "What would Onee-chan do?"
If it were Ushio, huh. Yeah, it feels like we could keep moving forward.
No matter what kind of monster she faced, she'd probably hit it with a flying kick.
A-A flying kick might be impossible.
You don't have to copy her that far.
Anyway, just a little more patience. We're definitely going to leave this island alive.
Yeah!
--What!?
What happened!? It suddenly went pitch black...
...A p-power outage?
